source: Baratza official documentation, community measurements (coffeeadhoc.com, HomeBarista forum)
note: 40 settings at ~23 μm/step = 200–1120 μm range. Higher fines fraction than hand grinders due to conical geometry at lower RPM.

psd_model.note: Higher fines fraction (20%) reflects electric conical burr behavior. Fines peak at 50 μm. Main sigma broader than hand grinders.
